name: UnderOneRoof
short_description: This is a 10 minute short story game adapted from real events. Players will follow the perspective of the female protagonist, click on items or move through the prompts of the scene and tags, and experience this unexpected family upheaval.
detailed_description:
(Using translator)

This short game has fewer interactions and a longer textual storyline.

#This is a 2D pixel style storyline game born in RPGMaker.
#Players need to obtain more scene information and advance the main plot through simple mobile clicks, facing the truth that has been unraveled.


Self rating: 6/10

—— Bilibili：危途异客
